caption: A person holds a sports trading card featuring Derek Jeter, which is encased in a clear protective sleeve. The card displays a photograph of Jeter and a blue ink signature, with the text "DEREK JETER" printed at the bottom. The person's hands hold the card steady in the foreground, while the background reveals a larger scene within a video stream. In this background, a man wearing a blue t-shirt and glasses sits at a desk with a computer monitor and a microphone. A large logo featuring palm trees sits on the table surface. On-screen overlays include the text "JASPYS LIVE" and "CASEBREAKS.COM". As the sequence progresses, the person subtly shifts their grip and angle on the card, moving it slightly while maintaining a close-up focus on the signature and Jeter's name. The man in the background remains seated, watching the action.
